__fixture__.name: entry_sheet_open_local_target_folder
__fixture__.scenario: Paired with entry_row_open_local_folder_drag_drop.json. The drop activates one open_flow_sheet_record (open_flow_sheet_class = open_local_target, sheet_surface_class = window_attached_sheet). The sheet exposes target_type, policy_restrictions (current trust_state pending, no authority_delta until admit), result_mode (single resolved mode = folder), trust_posture, fallback_actions, and the seven §5.3 pre-commit invariants. No durable write, no trust change, no runtime attach, no profile retarget before the user commits. Demonstrates §5.1 sheet class open_local_target, §5.2 required disclosure axes, §5.3 pre-commit invariants, §6 invariant 6.

target_type_disclosure.summary: Local folder. Identity verified by ADR-0006 four-layer record.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: Trust review opens after the folder activates. Drop did not grant trust.

result_mode_disclosure.summary: Resolves as folder; promotion to repo_root happens only on user request.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Trust prompt opens immediately after the folder activates.

fallback_disclosure.summary: Cancel preserves the previous workspace; safe mode is reachable if the activation fails.

presentation_subtitle: Trust review opens after the folder activates.
